experiment.name: HIPENGINE_MTP_OVERLAP_VERIFY_COMMIT_PROPOSER
experiment.intent: Let verify_chain_bulk_and_commit return after enqueueing verifier commit, then run the sidecar proposer update on a second HIP stream while the commit drains on stream 0.
experiment.decision: Rejected for default speed row. Keep the stream plumbing default-off as diagnostic infrastructure only.
experiment.reason: The side stream hid a small verify/commit slice but increased proposer/update wall more than it saved, so aggregate suite wall and AR-normalized speed regressed with identical acceptance.

correctness.default_exact_smoke_command: PROMPT_TOKENS=$(cat /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt); HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 1800 python3 scripts/mtp_chain_e2e_smoke.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-tokens "$PROMPT_TOKENS" --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budget 3 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --json /tmp/hipengine-mtp-overlap-default-off-smoke.json
correctness.overlap_exact_smoke_command: PROMPT_TOKENS=$(cat /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt); HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 HIPENGINE_MTP_OVERLAP_VERIFY_COMMIT_PROPOSER=1 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 1800 python3 scripts/mtp_chain_e2e_smoke.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-tokens "$PROMPT_TOKENS" --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budget 3 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --json /tmp/hipengine-mtp-overlap-on-smoke.json

commands.suite_off: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 HIPENGINE_MTP_OVERLAP_VERIFY_COMMIT_PROPOSER=0 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 7200 python3 scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 3 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-overlap-off-9prompt-d32 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-overlap-off-9prompt-d32.json
commands.suite_on: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 HIPENGINE_MTP_OVERLAP_VERIFY_COMMIT_PROPOSER=1 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 7200 python3 scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 3 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-overlap-on-9prompt-d32 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-overlap-on-9prompt-d32.json
